source.detail: Epoxide ring-opening cure step (aliphatic amine): glycidyl phenyl ether + methylamine -> 1-(methylamino)-3-phenoxy-2-propanol. GFN2-xTB (xtb 6.7.1) gas-phase reaction enthalpy at 298 K over conformer-searched global minima; the MaterialsCodeGraph eval baseline (mcg/evals/paper_targets.yaml, cure_dh_gpe_methylamine_gfn2, reaction_thermo.dh298_kJ_per_mol = -116.1 kJ/mol = -1.203292 eV per reaction event, measured 2026-07). Literature calorimetric window for epoxy-amine addition: -95 to -118 kJ/mol per epoxide.
